{{ $.Chart.Name }} has been installed.

This proof-of-concept leaves the Rancher-owned project Grafana, Prometheus, and Alertmanager runtimes disabled by default.

Publish external endpoints for Rancher consumers by setting:
  dashboardIntegration.grafanaURL
  dashboardIntegration.prometheusURL
  dashboardIntegration.alertmanagerURL

If you re-enable a runtime component and leave its dashboardIntegration URL empty, the chart falls back to the legacy in-cluster service URL for that component.

Prometheus Federator still needs complementary operator changes before this can become the default end-to-end project monitoring path.
